rows.name: Heimerdinger - Inventor
rows.text: I have all :rb_exhaust: abilities of all friendly legends, units, and gear.

rows.text: As you play me, you may discard 1 as an additional cost. If you do, reduce my cost by :rb_energy_2:.

rows.name: Flame Chompers

rows.name: Magma Wurm
rows.text: Other friendly units enter ready.

rows.name: Captain Farron

rows.name: Iron Ballista

rows.name: Thermo Beam

rows.name: Unlicensed Armory
rows.text: Discard 1, :rb_exhaust:: Choose a friendly unit. The next time it would die this turn, you may pay :rb_rune_fury: to heal it, exhaust it, and recall it instead. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.)

rows.name: Brynhir Thundersong
rows.text: When you play me, opponents can't play cards this turn.

rows.name: Darius - Trifarian
rows.text: When you play your second card in a turn, give me +2 :rb_might: this turn and ready me.

rows.name: Draven - Showboat
rows.text: My Might is increased by your points.

rows.name: Raging Firebrand
rows.text: When you play me, the next spell you play this turn costs :rb_energy_5: less.

rows.name: Ravenborn Tome
rows.text: :rb_exhaust:: The next spell you play this turn deals 1 Bonus Damage. (Each instance of damage the spell deals is increased by 1.)

rows.text: [Assault 3] (+3 :rb_might: while I'm an attacker.)If an opponent controls a battlefield, I enter ready.When I conquer, you may pay :rb_energy_1: to return me to my owner's hand.

rows.text: [Deflect 2] (Opponents must pay :rb_rune_rainbow::rb_rune_rainbow: to choose me with a spell or ability.)When I attack, deal 5 damage split among any number of enemy units here.

rows.text: You may pay :rb_rune_calm: as an additional cost to play me.When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, draw 1.

rows.name: Defy

rows.name: Wielder of Water
rows.text: While I'm attacking or defending alone, I have +2 :rb_might:.

rows.name: Adaptatron
rows.text: When I conquer, you may kill a gear. If you do, buff me. (If I don't have a buff, I get a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

rows.name: Block
rows.text: [Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Give a unit [Shield 3] and [Tank] this turn. (+3 :rb_might: while it's a defender. It must be assigned combat damage first.)

rows.text: Choose a unit. Play a ready Reflection unit token to your base. It becomes a copy of that unit. Give it [Temporary]. (Kill it at the start of its controller's Beginning Phase, before scoring.)

rows.name: Keeper's Verdict
rows.text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Choose an enemy unit at a battlefield. Its owner places it on the top or bottom of their Main Deck.

rows.name: Abandoned Hall
rows.text: When a player plays a spell, they may give a unit they control here +1 :rb_might: this turn.

rows.name: Altar of Blood
rows.text: If a unit here would die during combat, its controller may pay :rb_rune_rainbow::rb_rune_rainbow::rb_rune_rainbow: to heal it, exhaust it, and recall it instead.

rows.name: Forbidding Waste
rows.text: While a unit here is defending alone, it has -2 :rb_might:. (It's alone if there are no other friendly units here.)

rows.name: Forgotten Library
rows.text: While you control this battlefield, when you play a spell, if you spent :rb_energy_4: or more, [Predict]. (Look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)

rows.name: Frozen Fortress
rows.text: At the start of each player's Beginning Phase, deal 1 to each unit here. (This happens before scoring.)

rows.name: Gardens of Becoming
rows.text: Units here have ":rb_exhaust:: Gain 1 XP."

rows.name: Ripper's Bay
rows.text: When a unit here is returned to a player's hand, that player may pay :rb_energy_1: to channel 1 rune exhausted.

rows.name: Star Spring
rows.text: The first time a player plays a non-token unit here each turn, they may move another unit they control here to its base.

rows.name: The Academy
rows.text: When you hold here, give your next spell this turn [Repeat] equal to its base cost. (You may pay the additional cost to repeat the spell's effect.)

rows.name: Valley of Idols
rows.text: When a player plays a unit here, they may pay :rb_energy_1: to [Buff] it. (Give it a +1 :rb_might: buff if it doesn't have one.)

rows.name: Vaults of Helia
rows.text: When you hold here, your non-token units cost :rb_energy_1: more to play this turn.

rows.name: Jhin - Virtuoso (Overnumbered)
rows.text: When you play a spell, if you spent :rb_energy_4: or more, you may banish it. Then, if there are four spells banished with me, put each in its trash, channel 4 runes, and draw 1.

rows.name: Jhin - Virtuoso (Signature)
rows.text: When you play a spell, if you spent :rb_energy_4: or more, you may banish it. Then, if there are four spells banished with me, put each in its trash, channel 4 runes, and draw 1.

rows.name: Pyke - Bloodharbor Ripper (Overnumbered)
rows.text: :rb_energy_1:, :rb_exhaust:: Return a friendly unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand. Play a Gold gear token exhausted.

rows.name: Pyke - Bloodharbor Ripper (Signature)
rows.text: :rb_energy_1:, :rb_exhaust:: Return a friendly unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand. Play a Gold gear token exhausted.

rows.name: Lillia - Bashful Bloom (Overnumbered)
rows.text: :rb_energy_4:, :rb_exhaust:: Play a ready 3 :rb_might: Sprite unit token with [Temporary]. This ability costs :rb_energy_1: less for each friendly unit with [Temporary].

rows.name: Lillia - Bashful Bloom (Signature)
rows.text: :rb_energy_4:, :rb_exhaust:: Play a ready 3 :rb_might: Sprite unit token with [Temporary]. This ability costs :rb_energy_1: less for each friendly unit with [Temporary].

rows.name: Ivern - Green Father (Signature)
rows.text: When you conquer or hold, you may exhaust me to replace that battlefield with a Brush battlefield token.

rows.text: When you conquer or hold, you may exhaust me to replace that battlefield with a Brush battlefield token.

rows.name: LeBlanc - Deceiver (Overnumbered)
rows.text: When you conquer or hold, you may discard 1 and exhaust me to play a ready Reflection unit token there. It becomes a copy of another unit there. Give it [Temporary].

rows.text: When you conquer or hold, you may discard 1 and exhaust me to play a ready Reflection unit token there. It becomes a copy of another unit there. Give it [Temporary].

rows.name: Baron Nashor (Ultimate)
rows.text: As you play me, add the Baron Pit battlefield token to the board if it's not there already. If you do, I enter there.I can't be chosen by enemy spells and abilities.Other friendly units have +2 :rb_might:.
